query: color banding posterized gradient sky digital artifact
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — color banding in skies, posterization artifacts

response.objective_caption: A blue sedan sits on a paved road in the foreground with its rear to the camera, while a long line of cars, trucks, and SUVs extends along an adjacent grassy shoulder with their front ends facing the viewer. Beyond the vehicles, suburban houses with light-colored walls and terracotta roofs sit on a gently sloping hillside dotted with trees. A mountain range spans the horizon beneath a clear pale blue sky, and dry golden grass with patches of green weeds covers the ground between the roadway and the shoulder.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A blue sedan sits on a paved road in the foreground with its rear to the camera, partially cut off by the right edge of the frame, while a long line of cars, trucks, and SUVs extends along an adjacent grassy shoulder with their front ends facing the viewer. The casual snapshot composition features awkward framing that obstructs the nearest vehicle, conveying an unplanned vernacular energy. Beyond the vehicles, suburban houses with light-colored walls and terracotta roofs sit on a gently sloping hillside dotted with trees, with a mountain range spanning the horizon beneath a clear pale blue sky. Dry golden grass with patches of green weeds covers the ground between the roadway and the shoulder.
